info.name: School Management API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the School Management REST API.

Base URL: http://localhost:3000

Endpoints:
- POST /api/schools  — Add a new school
- GET  /api/schools  — List schools sorted by proximity
- GET  /api/schools/:id — Get school by ID
- GET  /health       — Health check

request.description: Verifies the API server is running and returns uptime information.
Adds a new school with valid name, address, latitude, and longitude.

response.name: 201 Created — School Added

request.description: Demonstrates validation failure when required field 'name' is missing.
Demonstrates validation failure when latitude is out of range (-90 to 90).
Lists all schools sorted by distance from New Delhi (28.6139, 77.2090) using Haversine formula.

response.name: 200 OK — Schools Sorted
400 Missing Query Params

request.description: Fetches a single school record by its primary key ID.

response.name: 200 OK
404 Not Found
